description_long: This object is an egg-shaped form with a smooth, hard exterior, predominantly white in color with a large, irregular yellow patch that wraps around one side. The yellow area has jagged, zigzag edges, resembling a stylized yolk or a decorative marking. The surface appears unblemished and glossy, with no visible cracks or openings. The egg is ovoid, with a slightly broader base and a more tapered top. The coloration is bold and simple, with the yellow section providing a striking contrast against the white shell. There are no visible features such as a stand, opening, or additional ornamentation.
description: A smooth, white egg with a large, jagged yellow patch wrapping around one side, creating a bold visual contrast.
description_view_0: The egg is mostly white with a prominent yellow patch starting from the left and wrapping around the lower side.
description_view_1: The egg appears almost entirely white from this angle, with only a small tip of the yellow patch visible at the top right.
description_view_2: The yellow patch is more visible, covering a significant portion of the right side with jagged edges.
description_view_3: The yellow patch dominates this view, covering most of the visible surface with its irregular, zigzag border.
attribute_orientation: upright with the broader end at the bottom and the pointed end at the top
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a food preparation or breakfast setting, possibly displayed in a bowl or carton.
attribute_decorative_patterns: large, jagged yellow patch on a white background
